final:
module top_module(
	input [7:0]binary_in,    
	output reg [3:0]hundreds,
	output reg [3:0]tens,
	output reg [3:0]ones
);always @(*) 
		begin : proc_
			hundreds = binary_in / 100;
			tens = (binary_in % 100 ) /10;
			ones = binary_in % 10;
		end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      hundreds = ~binary_in; tens = ~binary_in; ones = ~binary_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
